description: Triggers when the user needs to create, fix, or manage YAML frontmatter properties in Obsidian notes

queries.query: add frontmatter to this meeting note with date, attendees, and tags
Obsidian is showing a YAML parse error on this note

add an aliases field to this note with two alternative names

the date in my frontmatter is in the wrong format, fix it to ISO 8601
add wikilinks between my product notes and the strategy MOC
create a mermaid flowchart for the deployment process
write a Python script to process CSV files
summarize this YouTube video for me
create an Excalidraw diagram for the system architecture
optimize my LinkedIn profile headline

create an Obsidian canvas with my strategy notes
build a new note about product discovery principles
